features.name: SQLite Database Schema
features.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, projects, and tasks. Uses SQLite with file-based storage. Models: User (email, hashed_password, name), Project (name, description, owner_id), Task (title, description, project_id, assignee_id, status).

work_history.note: Models importable, all 3 model tests pass, User/Project/Task with relationships validated

features.completion_notes: SQLAlchemy models for User, Project, Task all importable and tested. 3/26 tests cover models directly.

features.name: Frontend Project Setup
features.description: Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS. App Router structure with pages for login, register, dashboard, projects, and tasks. API client using axios with empty baseURL and Next.js rewrites to proxy /api/* to backend port 8000. Use next.config.mjs (not .ts).

work_history.note: Next.js 14 production build succeeds. All 9 routes compile: /, /dashboard, /login, /projects, /projects/new, /register, /tasks, /tasks/new, /_not-found

features.completion_notes: Next.js 14 with Tailwind CSS, App Router, all pages compile. Production build succeeds with NODE_ENV=production.

features.name: Health Check and App Config
features.description: GET /api/health returns {status: "healthy"}. Backend entry point at src/fixture/main.py.

work_history.note: Health endpoint at /api/health returns status healthy, test passes (1/26 tests)

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: POST /api/auth/register accepts {email, password, name}, creates user with bcrypt-hashed password, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns {token}. GET /api/users/me returns current user profile. JWT middleware extracts user from Authorization: Bearer header.

work_history.note: Auth routes implemented: register, login, /me. 7/26 auth tests pass including register, login, duplicate, wrong password, protected routes

features.completion_notes: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me all working. JWT middleware implemented. All 7 auth tests pass.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page at /dashboard showing project and task counts with quick links.

work_history.note: Frontend: /dashboard/page.tsx exists and compiled in production build with 1.47kB size.

features.completion_notes: Dashboard page at /dashboard exists and builds successfully in production.

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: Sidebar navigation with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard component protects authenticated routes. Layout component wraps all authenticated pages.

work_history.note: Sidebar.tsx, AuthGuard.tsx, Layout.tsx all present in frontend/src/components/. All compiled in production build.

features.completion_notes: Sidebar, AuthGuard, and Layout components all present and included in production build.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Full CRUD for projects. POST /api/projects creates project with owner_id from auth. GET /api/projects lists user's projects. GET /api/projects/{id} returns single project. DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project. Frontend pages: /projects (list), /projects/new (create form).

work_history.note: Backend: GET/POST /api/projects, GET/DELETE /api/projects/{id} all implemented with auth. 8/26 tests pass. Frontend: /projects and /projects/new pages exist.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD for projects. Backend with auth enforcement. Frontend pages /projects and /projects/new. All 8 project tests pass.

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. POST /api/tasks creates task with project_id. GET /api/tasks lists user's tasks. DELETE /api/tasks/{id} removes task. Frontend pages: /tasks (list), /tasks/new (create form with project selector).

work_history.note: Backend: GET/POST /api/tasks, GET/DELETE /api/tasks/{id} with project_id FK. 8/26 tests pass. Frontend: /tasks and /tasks/new pages with project selector.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. Backend with auth enforcement. Frontend pages /tasks and /tasks/new. All 8 task tests pass.
